name: @ujjwalvivek/svg-metro
description: A playable Mini Metro-inspired transit simulator contained inside one SVG file.

scripts.deploy: npm run build && rm -rf deploy && mkdir -p deploy && cp index.html deploy/index.html && cp dist/minimetro.svg deploy/minimetro.svg && npx wrangler pages deploy deploy/ --project-name=svg-metro
scripts.upload: npm run build && npx wrangler r2 object put portfolio-assets/games/minimetro.svg --file dist/minimetro.svg --content-type image/svg+xml --cache-control "public, max-age=300" --remote
